text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: tool' (S1 L3), never presenting it as a decision to confirm. S2-codex-1 (L3) and

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: S2-codex-2 (L3) inherit 'CLI' without question. S3 confirms 'A Node.js CLI tool named

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: designdna' (S3 L3) with a fixed, non-configurable viewport (S3 L41, L96). Never
